title: Allow users to add quick filter to Kanban boards
excerpt: Allow users/owners to add quick filters to kanban boards, beside the person quick-filter. I found it to be one of the most useful features of JIRA boards, because I could create filters for our less technically-inclined …

posts.author: steven.glickman (Steven Glickman)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow users/owners to add quick filters to kanban boards, beside the person quick-filter. I found it to be one of the most useful features of JIRA boards, because I could create filters for our less technically-inclined team members, and they just needed to click on them.
